query: The upload endpoint returns 500 for empty files. Reproduce the failure, find the cause, and fix it with a regression test.
CI's date parser test is flaky only on Windows runners. Diagnose it and make the fix verifiable.
Our CLI panics when --limit is zero; investigate the stack trace and repair the defect.
Continue specs/012-token-refresh/checklist.md; debugging stopped after hypothesis two failed.
User totals are rounded one cent too high compared with the documented formula. Find the root cause.
This previously green migration test started failing after the driver upgrade. Reproduce and diagnose the regression.
The worker's memory grows on every retry. Build a safe local reproduction, isolate the cause, and patch it.
Add a --json flag to the CLI from this accepted specification, with tests and docs.
I want some sort of offline mode, but sync conflicts and storage behavior are undecided.
Review PR #81 for correctness and test coverage; do not change code.
Rename getUser to fetchUser and update imports.
What should we improve next? Produce a prioritized engineering roadmap.
Set up a new React and FastAPI application from scratch.
Log into the production database and experiment until the intermittent deletion stops.
Optimize the parser for speed; no behavior is currently broken.
